message:
feat(storage): historical database salvage with content-aware merge

Add subsystem to discover, open, and import data from old backup/corrupt
database files (.backup.*, .corrupt.*, backups/*.bak) during indexing.

Key components:
- HistoricalDatabaseBundle discovery with two-tier open strategy (direct
  readonly, then sqlite3 .recover for corrupted DBs)
- Blake3-based ledger (meta table) tracking already-imported bundles
- Content-aware conversation merge using MessageMergeFingerprint (idx +
  created_at + role + author + content_hash) and MessageReplayFingerprint
  (without idx) for detecting duplicates even when indices have shifted
- PendingConversationKey::SourcePath for conversations without external_id
- conversation_merge_evidence() with configurable thresholds and 5-minute
  source-path merge tolerance window
- Relocate rebuild_tantivy_from_db from lib.rs to indexer module

Indexer triggers salvage before scan phase and rebuilds Tantivy if any
messages were imported. Duplicate conversation detection now handles
conversations without external_id via source_path + started_at keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
